name: Local Mint
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Localmint with Synup
tags: india; france; uae; ireland; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
Local Mint + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Local Mint with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Local Mint?

Local Mint, a growing online resource for discovering local businesses and services, assists users in connecting with their community's offerings. Whether you're exploring new places or seeking trusted neighborhood businesses, Local Mint provides a fresh perspective and reliable information to enhance your local experiences.

Why Local Mint + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Local Mint, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Local Mint through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Local Mint.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Local Mint, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Local Mint + Synup?

The Local Mint integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Local Mint integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Local Mint logo to manage the Synup + Local Mint integration and associated settings.
